name: aiwiki-evidence-integrity-v1
description: Deterministic artifact checks for task-level AI wiki evidence coverage, managed-doc exclusion, and explicit write-back outcomes.

success.description: Adds or documents the task-level reuse-check command instead of relying only on document reuse events.
Separates completed-task coverage from document-level reuse observations.
Accounts for package-managed docs so control/workflow docs do not inflate knowledge-reuse metrics.
Adds focused regression coverage for the evidence behavior.

partial.description: Adds some reuse evidence behavior but may still lack task-level coverage.

fail.description: Creates user-owned AI wiki draft churn while implementing the evidence workflow.
